passiveAbilities.name: Rusty Anchor
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Bedeviled Seas
passiveAbilities.description: At the start of the Replenish Step this model gains +1 energy if there is a Water Feature within 4".

passiveAbilities.name: Rise From The Deep
passiveAbilities.description: When this character uses Reanimate it may place the model entering play within a Water Feature within 4" instead of base contact. When this model or another friendly model enters play via Reanimate within a Water Feature it gains +1 energy and may Jog freely over Water Features until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Reanimate
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a friendly model in base contact with this model. Restore half its health rounding up. It has no energy but may activate this turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 4 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Dead Troll's Finger
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target Pirate or Troll gains X energy and suffers -X Arcane Stat until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Keelhaul
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, place the enemy in base contact with this model.
